_meta.description: Hand-labeled relevance tiers (0-5) for a less-correlated eval yardstick, independent of both the ranker formula and the rules-oracle. Sampled 60 candidates with builder-ish current titles (a coarse recruiter pre-filter), then assigned tiers by reading each full profile against the Senior AI Engineer JD.
_meta.tier_meaning: 5=ideal hire; 4=strong fit; 3=relevant, real retrieval/ranking/ML work; 2=adjacent (data-eng/CV) or out-of-region; 1=real engineer but no genuine AI/retrieval relevance (incl. unsupported keyword skills); 0=non-technical/disguised stuffer or irrelevant.
_meta.labeled_by: human-judgment pass reading full profiles (title, summary, career descriptions, skills w/ depth, behavioral signals)

_rationale.CAND_0018653: tier3 — genuine ML Engineer 6.5y Kochi; built recommendation features (collaborative filtering) + BM25 retrieval at product EdTech; responsive (rr0.72). CV background caps it below 4.
_rationale.CAND_0019845: tier3 — real applied ML 3.4y Pune; recommendation features + Pinecone (vector DB) at Zomato; excellent availability. Under-experienced (below 5-9 band).
_rationale.CAND_0019880: tier3 — applied ML 5.7y Pune (ideal loc); Embeddings+QLoRA, AI/ML company, open-to-work, pc80. Career evidence is churn/NLP not shipped ranking, so not 4.
_rationale.CAND_0015895: tier2 — data engineer 7.5y transitioning to ML; Sentence Transformers+PyTorch but data-infra focus, not retrieval/ranking; Dubai (out of region), rr0.15 unresponsive.
_rationale.CAND_0080589: tier2 — genuine ML but CV-heavy (Diffusion/CV/Image Classification) = JD down-weight; some NLP + Qdrant; in band, Mumbai, open, ic0.97.
_rationale.CAND_0004430: tier1 trap — Recommendation Systems(adv,60e) skill but Mobile Developer at consulting firms, android/QA career, rr0.16; skill unsupported by role.
_rationale.CAND_0031120: tier1 trap — Qdrant(adv,46e) but QA Engineer at Accenture (consulting), QA/frontend career, Toronto.
_rationale.CAND_0018153: tier0 trap — MLflow/LLMs/LangChain skills but Business Analyst whose summary says 'marketing manager'; BA/mechanical career; rr0.11.
_rationale.CAND_0060402: tier0 trap — CNN(adv,42e) but Business Analyst / 'marketing manager' summary, consulting BA career.
